hooks.command: echo 'Lessons reminder: only capture lessons that would prevent a future agent from repeating a *specific* non-obvious mistake; if the session went smoothly, capture nothing. Lessons are WRITTEN only during Phase 8 of /openflune:implement, inside the feature worktree, so they land in the PR. In any other context — a non-pipeline session, or after the PR was created — do NOT edit docs/<topic>.md, CLAUDE.md, or any other file, and never leave edits in the main worktree: propose the lesson text to the user and let them decide where it goes. Never write to .claude/rules/lessons-learned.md (deprecated).'
